summary: Product images testing completed successfully. All 32 products now have working images on /products page, homepage featured section, and product detail pages. Previously missing images for 16 products (Tirzepatide 10/15/20mg, Semax 10mg, Selank 10mg, TB-500 20mg, BPC-157 10mg, BPC157/TB4 Blend, HGH 10iu, HGH 176-191 5mg, IGF-1 LR3 1mg, CJC1295 DAC 5mg, Tesamorelin+Ipamorelin Blend, Ipamorelin 10mg, Tesamorelin 20mg, Glow Blend 70mg) are now loading correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 32 product images are now working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_product_images.py verify API image_url presence and image endpoint HTTP 200 responses. Frontend testing confirmed images load on /products page (32 images), homepage featured section (6 images), and product detail pages (tested Semax 10mg, BPC-157 10mg, Glow Blend 70mg). Image serving endpoint at /api/images/products/{filename} is working correctly with proper 404 handling for missing files.
api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/products - Returns 32 products, all with image_url
GET /api/products?featured=true - Returns 6 featured products with images
GET /api/products/{id} - Returns single product with image_url
